title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same capabilities as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models for chat, embeddings, and tool usage.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama-cli)
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go; browse, chat, and manage models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline code suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings and llama-index to chat with local documents.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds JWT auth, rate limits, and CORS to Ollama’s API.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing Ollama generators and embedders for pipeline building.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models to any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama with async HTTP, streaming, and strong type safety.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama supporting .NET 6+, streaming, and embeddings via System.Text.Json.
